first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: Hi! I am a legally distinct prize animal.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: My tag says NOT A BEAR in very small letters.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: I am filled with cotton and confidential information.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: The confidential part gets itchy when someone familiar walks in.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: You are making my stitches think.

after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
after_lost_token.text: You brought the Lost Token back.

after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
after_lost_token.text: Good. Tokens get lonely in pockets.

after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
after_lost_token.text: You used to want the blue prize.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: This is like archaeology, but fluffier.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: Ticket Stub first. That is where wanting starts.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: Lost Token next. That is where returning starts.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: Blank Employee Badge last. That one is shy.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: Please sort gently. Some prizes bruise on the inside.

prize_sort_wrong.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_wrong.text: Those memories are wearing each other's hats.

prize_sort_wrong.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_wrong.text: That order makes the cotton nervous.

prize_sort_wrong.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_wrong.text: Nope. The badge is trying to cut in line.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: Some rewards remember their owners before the owners remember them.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: The Lost Token remembers coming back.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: The Blank Employee Badge remembers being hidden.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: It is okay if you do not know why that matters yet.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: Cotton keeps secrets until the seams are ready.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: That is not mean. I checked.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: Original things can be gone and still leave kindness-shaped dents.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: Employee 04 made the arcade remember wrong.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: You are helping it remember softly.
